articles.title: "Charlie wasn’t kidding": Turning Point USA fires back at Candace Owens as Charlie Kirk controversy escalates
articles.description: Candace Owens and Turning Point USA became embroiled in a public dispute after Owens questioned the authenticity and context of a viral Charlie Kirk video. Owens claimed the organization ignored her private email seeking clarification, while TPUSA responded publicly, insisting the video was real and accusing her of being “obsessed.” Screenshots of Owens’ alleged email were also shared online, escalating tensions further. The controversy has since sparked intense debate across conservative media circles and social media platforms.

Reports suggest the ECB has offered him an exit route from the captaincy as an investigation continues. At 35, Stokes could resign, take a break, or even retire from international cricket, sparking uncertainty over England’s future leadership.
